title: Create Frosty Treats
description: Ho, ho, ho! Bringing snow, machines, and lots of sweets — play safe, don’t get a sugar high, and enjoy!
body:
❄️ Welcome to Create Frosty Treats 🎄
Step into a snowy winter workshop where your goal is to craft and enjoy festive sweets! With Create and its add-ons, you’ll produce four types of chocolate, candy canes, waffles, marshmallows, glazed fruits, gingerbread, rolls, and many other classic treats. Explore snowy biomes, build trains across rivers and canyons, and complete production milestones to grow your winter workshop. Every creation adds warmth and joy to your frozen world.
🌨 About the world and weather ❄️
The world is a true winter wonderland — every biome is covered in snow, even deserts and badlands! Rivers carve through massive canyons, and bridges spanning 100+ blocks make perfect routes for your Create trains. Snow blankets the land, creating a cozy yet challenging environment for building, crafting, and expanding your sweet production. Plan your workflow carefully to maximize output across the frozen landscape.
🍫 Sweet Creations 🧁
In Create Frosty Treats, your main focus is producing festive sweets that taste amazing and help you reach new production milestones:
- Four types of Chocolate
- Candy Canes
- Waffles
- Marshmallows
- Glazed Fruits
- Gingerbread & other cookies
- Rolls and baked treats
Craft, bake, and optimize your production to build the ultimate winter workshop powered by sweets and Create!
Multiplayer Fun 🎉
On multiplayer servers, Create Frosty Treats is perfect for friends — you can claim areas, form teams, and use the built-in voice chat to coordinate your winter chaos. Share sweets, wrap presents, and build snowy creations together, turning the frozen world into a festive playground.
###
Mods used from CurseForge:
Click to see the list of mods - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) by MrCrayfish - [Chunk Sending](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-sending-forge-fabric) by someaddon - [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) by MrCrayfish - [Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard) by someaddon - [Fast Async World Save](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-async-world-save-forge-fabric) by someaddon - [Structure Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-essentials-forge-fabric) by someaddon
